form.formComment: Gave plenty of ground last start when well beaten into ninth behind Western Action at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 42 on April 7 at $8.50. Raced better the start before that with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr5) over 1660m after being wide early at Albion Park beaten 12 m by Amillionchances (1:58.80) in 3yo+ NR 38 to 42 on March 30 at $34. Should get every chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Has been racing well this preparation and showed plenty of improvement following February 4 run. Last start won by 1.4 m as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:13.20) beating Take Courage in 3yo+ NR up to 40 on February 11 at $1.65. This race will be harder than that win. Might find this beyond him.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Surrendered the lead over the early stages of the event.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Warrawee Flyer at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 42 on March 31 at $8. One of the main contenders.

Forward performance expected.
